diagrams.title: Display List Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows the structure and flow of display list processing from creation to execution
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how display lists are created, stored, and executed in a graphics system

diagrams.title: Hierarchical Display List Structure
diagrams.description: Tree structure showing parent-child relationships in hierarchical display lists
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how transformations cascade through hierarchical display lists

diagrams.title: Immediate vs Retained Mode
diagrams.description: Comparison diagram showing the two rendering approaches
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the difference between immediate and retained mode rendering paradigms

diagrams.title: Linear Display List Example
diagrams.description: Sequential storage of graphics primitives in a linear display list
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how graphics commands are stored sequentially in linear display lists
